inputs.label: Radius
inputs.businessContext: The radius of the circle. Provide if known.

inputs.label: Diameter
inputs.businessContext: The diameter of the circle. Provide if known.

inputs.label: Area
inputs.businessContext: The area of the circle. Provide if known.

inputs.label: Unit Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor to convert input length unit to output length unit. E.g., cm to m: 0.01. Area is squared automatically.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding outputs.

formulas.effectiveRadius: radius * conversionFactor || (diameter * conversionFactor) / 2 || Math.sqrt((area * conversionFactor * conversionFactor) / Math.PI) || 0
